message:
test(e2e): concurrent close/update/reopen blocked cache integrity stress test

Add e2e_close_update_reopen_preserve_blocked_cache_integrity regression
test that stresses the blocked issues cache with 4 concurrent threads
(closer, updater, reopener, reader) against the same workspace.

Creates 6 close targets, 3 reopen targets (pre-closed), and 1 update
target, then runs concurrent operations with 10ms delays. Asserts no
integrity failure signals (unique constraint failures, corruption,
panics) appear in any thread's results, at least one success per role,
and doctor-healthy workspace afterward.

Utility helpers:
- has_integrity_failure_signal(): checks output for corruption and
  constraint-violation signals
- assert_no_integrity_failure_signals(): batch assertion across all
  concurrent results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
